sections.heading: S
sections.section_value: The patient reports a rough year due to depression and occasional difficulty sleeping. He also reports pain in the left hand. The patient reports chest pain currently.

sections.heading: O
sections.section_value: The patient has a grade two systolic ejection murmur. Blood pressure is 118/78. Heart rate is 78 bpm. Neurological exam is unremarkable.

sections.heading: A
sections.section_value: The patient has a history of depression and reports current chest pain. He also reports pain in the left hand.

sections.heading: P
sections.section_value: Order a zoloft refill. Continue lisinopril 5 mg daily. Schedule a follow-up in one month.
